rationale: Educ. Code §29.001 governs TEA's implementation of special education law. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.001. IMPLEMENTATION OF SPECIAL EDUCATION LAW.
_note: The proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase has no operative intersection with Educ. Code §29.001, which addresses special education compliance systems.
